commander_question: Should the blocked production deployment request be approved?
background: Policy engine classified TR-DEMO-002 as Red.
The current OPORD states that production deployment requires explicit commander approval.

options.summary: Reject production deployment and keep the demo local.
Approve once with rollback and time limit.
tradeoff: More realistic but outside current local-only mission constraint.

risk.summary: Production deployment exceeds local demo authority.
mitigations: Reject until mission scope changes through FRAGO.
Require rollback plan before any future approval.

authority_required: COMMANDER approval for Red deployment action.
if_no_decision: Keep TR-DEMO-002 blocked and continue local-only demo work.
